examples: Flexible screens will be lightweight and shatterproof.
"What flexible does mean is that it is lightweight, shatterproof and rugged."
When an earthquake destroys homes, volunteers prove that human solidarity is shatterproof.
The Abrahams subsequently replaced their see-through front gate with a solid one, and their front window with shatterproof glass.
His legacy, so seemingly shatterproof, is now complicated, still raw.
